pi_items.source: GitHub repository verified at https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-boot - confirmed real public repository
GitHub branch confirmed at https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-boot/tree/2.7.x - verified as existing branch in Spring Boot repository
Jenkins Git Plugin API documentation (https://javadoc.jenkins.io/plugin/git/hudson/plugins/git/extensions/impl/CleanBeforeCheckout.html) - verified as valid Git SCM extension class name
Jenkins Git Plugin API documentation (https://javadoc.jenkins.io/plugin/git/hudson/plugins/git/extensions/impl/PruneStaleBranch.html) - verified as valid Git SCM extension class name
Jenkins Git Plugin API documentation (https://javadoc.jenkins.io/plugin/git/hudson/plugins/git/extensions/impl/RelativeTargetDirectory.html) - verified as valid Git SCM extension class name
Task specification parameter for RelativeTargetDirectory extension - valid subdirectory name requested in task description
Task specification for output file location - setup_task.sh and export_result.sh reference this path

privileged_info_summary: The task references real external data: the Spring Boot repository (https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-boot) is a public, real GitHub repository with an existing 2.7.x branch. All three required Jenkins Git plugin extensions are valid: CleanBeforeCheckout, PruneStaleBranch, and RelativeTargetDirectory are authentic Jenkins Git SCM extension class names from the official Git Plugin. The expected repository URL is https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-boot.git, the branch is 2.7.x, and the subdirectory for checkout is 'sources'. The output file should be saved to /home/ga/spring_checkout_snippet.groovy.
